name: node-express-mongoose-todo-api
description: A RESTful Todo API server built with Node.js, Express, Mongoose, Passport, and JWT.

name: config
description: Folder containing system, logger, express, and authentication settings configurations.

name: app
description: Main folder hosting API modules, controllers, models, routing, helpers, and test files.

name: app/authentication
description: Folder hosting controller actions dealing with user register, login, and token validations.

name: app/helpers
description: Folder hosting general utility helpers like standard HTTP errors.

name: app/routes
description: Folder hosting the centralized Express routes registration logic.

name: app/todos
description: Folder hosting the Todo model, schemas, validations, and controller operations.

name: app/users
description: Folder hosting the User model, schemas, hashing middleware, validations, and user controllers.

name: Config Loader
description: Loads environment variable options through dotenv and makes them available globally.

name: Express Config
description: Bootstraps Express middlewares, body parser parsing, passport integration, routing, and error interceptors.

name: Winston Logger Config
description: Configures colorized console logging wrapper detailing which module produced the output.

name: Passport Auth Config
description: Sets up JWT passport validation middleware using user models to check incoming tokens.

name: AppError
description: Custom extension of the JavaScript built-in Error class containing an HTTP status property.

name: API Router
description: Central router routing paths to Auth, User, and Todo controllers, backed by passport security guards.

name: User
description: Mongoose schema representing user metadata, featuring validations, password hashing hooks, and token generators.

name: Todo
description: Mongoose schema mapping todo details (text, completed state, timestamps, creator association).

name: AuthController
description: Controller layer containing business workflows for logging in, registering, and validating active tokens.

name: UserController
description: Controller layer containing workflows to retrieve a list of users, fetch single profiles, or update users.

name: TodoController
description: Controller layer handling secure CRUD logic for todo documents associated with an owner.

name: MongoDB Database
description: Underlying document-oriented database storage for users and todo documents.

name: POST /login
description: Allows registered users to authenticate by email and password, returning user ID and JWT.

name: POST /register
description: Registers a new user profile using username, email, and password, returning ID and JWT.

name: GET /me
description: Verifies custom authorization header and returns user id corresponding to the token.

name: GET /users
description: JWT-guarded endpoint retrieving lists of all registered users.

name: GET /users/:id
description: JWT-guarded endpoint returning user profile metadata for a specific user ID.

name: PATCH /users/:id
description: JWT-guarded endpoint allowing modification of a user's details by ID.

name: GET /todos
description: JWT-guarded endpoint returning todo documents created by the authenticated user.

name: POST /todos
description: JWT-guarded endpoint to create a new todo document associated with the logged-in user.

name: GET /todos/:id
description: JWT-guarded endpoint returning a specific todo detail matching the ID and creator's ID.

name: DELETE /todos/:id
description: JWT-guarded endpoint removing a specific todo document matching the ID and creator's ID.

name: PATCH /todos/:id
description: JWT-guarded endpoint toggling completion status and updating completion timestamps.

name: User.prototype.generateToken
description: Generates a JWT signed payload that encapsulates the current user document.

name: User.pre('save')
description: Schema pre-save hook that hashes passwords using bcrypt before DB insertion.

name: exports.login
description: Validates email presence, verifies hashed passwords via bcrypt, and returns generated JWT tokens.

name: exports.register
description: Persists new user schemas and yields registration tokens on success.

name: exports.checkAuth
description: Validates header tokens directly against configurations without Passport.

name: exports.list
description: Queries Todo collections filter-scoped by the current request user identity.

name: exports.create
description: Creates a new Todo record linking the current request user ID as the owner.

name: exports.getById
description: Queries a single Todo document matching both document ID and creator ID.

name: exports.removeById
description: Finds and deletes a Todo document matching both document ID and creator ID.

name: exports.update
description: Finds and updates todo status, registering completed = true and updating completedAt timestamps.

name: exports.list
description: Queries and returns lists of all user documents from User collections.

name: exports.getById
description: Retrieves a user document by ID, checking format validity before query.

name: exports.update
description: Updates profile document matching parameters ID and returns updated document details.
